description: Error patterns for plugin error warner hook

rules.message: You may have forgotten to await a Promise. Add 'await' before the async function call.
Check if the object exists before accessing properties. Use optional chaining (?.) or null checks.
The object is null. Check for null values before accessing properties.
The value is not callable. Check that the function exists and is properly imported.
The module could not be found. Check the import path and ensure the package is installed.
Cannot assign to a property. The object may be undefined, null, or read-only.

rules.pattern: ENOENT: no such file or directory
rules.message: The file or directory does not exist. Check the path spelling and ensure it was created.
Permission denied. Check file permissions or try running with appropriate access rights.
JSON parsing failed. Check for syntax errors like trailing commas or unquoted keys.
The port is already in use. Either stop the other process or use a different port.
NPM dependency conflict. Try using --legacy-peer-deps or update conflicting packages.
TypeScript type inference failed. Add explicit type annotations.
ESLint found code style or potential bug issues. Run the linter fix command.
One or more tests failed. Review the test output for assertion failures.
Connection refused. The server may not be running or is unreachable.
